---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or new capability for Beantr
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Beantr doesn't support today? Describe the use
case, not just the solution.

## Proposal

What you'd like to see. Keep it within Beantr's shape: Markdown, shell, and
plain files — no new runtime services.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this, and why the proposal is better.

## Scope

- [ ] Skill contract (`SKILL.md`)
- [ ] Templates / ledger
- [ ] Installers / distribution
- [ ] Docs / landing site
- [ ] Other:

> Please wait for a maintainer to agree on the approach before opening a PR.
